businessQuestion: Which brands contribute the highest profit margins?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    BRAND,
    SUM(NET_SALES_AMT) AS REVENUE,
    SUM(GROSS_MARGIN_AMT) AS PROFIT,
    ROUND(
        SUM(GROSS_MARGIN_AMT)/
        NULLIF(SUM(NET_SALES_AMT),0)*100,2
    ) AS MARGIN_PCT
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_SALES FS
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_PRODUCT DP
ON FS.PRODUCT_KEY=DP.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY MARGIN_PCT DESC;
businessContext: Merchandising teams want to optimize assortment and focus on high-margin brands.
